revision.comment: Imported from wikipedia at 2025-05-10 18:58:20 on [[Template:Disambiguation page short description/doc]]
revision.text: Sets the string "Disambiguation page providing links to articles with similar titles" <small>([[Template talk:Disambiguation#Edit_request_for_inclusion_of_short_description_template|per discussion]])</small> as the [[WP:short description|short description]] (and adds the tracking category [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with short description]]) for disambiguation pages via the individual [[:Category:Disambiguation message boxes|disambiguation message box templates]].

Sets the string Disambiguation page providing links to articles with similar titles ([[Template talk:Disambiguation#Edit_request_for_inclusion_of_short_description_template|per discussion]]) as the [[WP:short description|short description]] for disambiguation pages via the individual [[:Category:Disambiguation message boxes|disambiguation message box templates]]. Adds the tracking category [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with short description]] via the pagetype parameter. The use of includeonly here and in the transclusions prevents the templates from receiving that short description and category.

{{documentation subpage}} Sets the string Disambiguation page providing links to articles with similar titles ([[Template talk:Disambiguation#Edit_request_for_inclusion_of_short_description_template|per discussion]]) as the [[WP:short description|short description]] for disambiguation pages via the individual [[:Category:Disambiguation message boxes|disambiguation message box templates]]. Adds the tracking category [[:Category:Disambiguation pages with short description]] via the pagetype parameter. The use of includeonly here and in the transclusions prevents the templates from receiving that short description and category.

revision.comment: Update description of what the current text string is
/* top */clean up per [[WP:CAT#T]] and [[WP:AWBREQ]] add template:Sandbox other
Reverted edits by [[Special:Contribs/24.76.240.64|24.76.240.64]] ([[User talk:24.76.240.64|talk]]) to last version by Jonesey95
category is being deleted following [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2022 November 12]]
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Disambiguation_page_short_description%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Auto short description}} This template sets the string Topics referred to by the same term ({{oldid2|1028539378|Poll|per discussion}}) as the [[WP:short description|short description]] for disambiguation pages via the individual [[:Category:Disambiguation message boxes|disambiguation message box templates]]. The use of includeonly here and in the transclusions prevents the templates from receiving that short description. {{Sandbox other||}} [[Category:Disambiguation and redirection templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
